parameters.content:
## YouTube Video Content Package Generator — GPT-4o-mini + Gmail

For YouTube creators, video marketers, and SEO agencies who want a complete ready-to-publish video package from just a topic. Submit the form with your video topic, audience, length, and tone. Two sequential GPT-4o-mini agents run in order — the first writes a structured full-length video script with hook, three content sections, conclusion, and CTA; the second generates the complete SEO metadata package: an optimized title, three alternative titles at different angles, a full YouTube description with hashtags, 15 tags, and timestamped chapters. Everything arrives in one Gmail email, ready to record and upload. No video generation, no Fal.run, no Upload-Post — just OpenAI and Gmail.

## How it works
- **1. Form — YouTube Content Request** collects video topic, target audience, video length, tone of voice, and your name
- **2. Set — Config Values** stores your recipient email, sender name, and channel niche — plus all form values
- **3. AI Agent — Write Video Script** uses GPT-4o-mini at temperature 0.7 to write the full script: Hook, Introduction, three named sections with examples and tips, Conclusion, and Call to Action
- **5. Set — Save Script and Config** saves the script output and re-carries all config values to the next agent
- **6. AI Agent — Generate SEO Package** uses GPT-4o-mini at temperature 0.3 to generate: main title, 3 alternative titles, full description, 15 tags, and chapters with timestamps
- **9. Code — Build Email** reads the SEO output and script, formats them into one structured plain text email with labeled sections
- **10. Gmail — Send Content Package** delivers the complete package to your inbox

## Set up steps
1. In **2. Set — Config Values** — replace PASTE_YOUR_EMAIL_HERE, PASTE_YOUR_NAME_HERE, and PASTE_YOUR_CHANNEL_NICHE_HERE
2. In **4. OpenAI — Script Model GPT-4o-mini** — connect your OpenAI credential
3. In **7. OpenAI — SEO Model GPT-4o-mini** — connect your OpenAI credential
4. In **10. Gmail — Send Content Package** — connect your Gmail OAuth2 credential
5. Activate and open the Form URL to generate your first video package

## Form Input and Config
User submits video topic, target audience, video length, tone of voice (optional, defaults to educational), and name. Config stores your email, name, and channel niche — GPT uses the niche to personalize both the script and the SEO metadata.

## Video Script Writing
GPT-4o-mini writes the complete spoken video script at temperature 0.7 for creative output. Structure: Hook (30 sec) → Introduction → Section 1 with example → Section 2 with tip → Section 3 with common mistake → Conclusion → CTA. Plain English, no markdown.

## Script Bridge
Saves the script from $json.output and re-carries all config values forward so the SEO agent has full context. This Set node is the bridge between the two AI agents.

## SEO Package Generation
GPT-4o-mini generates the complete metadata at temperature 0.3 for precise output. Returns 5 structured fields: main title under 60 chars, 3 alternative titles (curiosity, number, question angles), full description with hashtags, 15 mixed tags, and chapters with timestamps starting at 0:00.

## Email Assembly and Delivery
Builds one plain text email with all sections: topic summary, main title and 3 alternatives, 15 tags, chapters, full description, and complete video script. Sends to your inbox in one clean message.

parameters.formDescription: Get a complete YouTube video package — full script, SEO title, description, tags, and chapters. Ready to record and publish.

parameters.text:
=You are a professional YouTube scriptwriter for faceless educational videos.

Write a complete video script for the following:

Topic: {{ $json.videoTopic }}
Target audience: {{ $json.targetAudience }}
Video length: {{ $json.videoLength }}
Tone: {{ $json.toneOfVoice }}
Channel niche: {{ $json.channelNiche }}

Use this exact structure. Write in plain spoken English. No bullet points. No markdown. No asterisks.

HOOK
First 30 seconds. 3 to 4 short punchy sentences. Start with a problem or surprising fact. End with a reason to keep watching.

INTRODUCTION
One short paragraph. Tell viewers who this video is for and what they will learn.

SECTION 1 — [write a clear section title here]
2 to 3 paragraphs. Cover the first main point. Include a specific example.

SECTION 2 — [write a clear section title here]
2 to 3 paragraphs. Cover the second main point. Include one practical tip.

SECTION 3 — [write a clear section title here]
2 to 3 paragraphs. Cover the third main point. Include a common mistake to avoid.

CONCLUSION
One paragraph summarizing the 3 key takeaways.

CALL TO ACTION
2 sentences. Ask viewers to like, subscribe, and leave a comment with a specific question.

=You are a YouTube SEO expert. Create a complete metadata package for this video.

Topic: {{ $json.videoTopic }}
Audience: {{ $json.targetAudience }}
Niche: {{ $json.channelNiche }}
Length: {{ $json.videoLength }}

Return ONLY a valid JSON object. No extra text. No markdown. No backticks.

Required fields:

title
One YouTube title. Under 60 characters. Include the main keyword. Make it compelling.

alternativeTitles
Array of 3 alternative titles. Each under 60 characters. One curiosity angle, one number angle, one question angle.

description
Full YouTube description. Under 250 words. Plain text only.
First 2 sentences: hook with the main keyword.
Middle: 3 to 4 sentences on what viewers will learn.
End: call to action to subscribe and comment.
Last line: 3 to 5 hashtags.

tags
Array of 15 strings. Mix short and long tail keywords. All relevant to the topic and niche.

chapters
Array of chapter objects. Each object has two fields: timestamp as MM:SS string, and title under 40 characters. First chapter always starts at 0:00. Space them evenly across the video length.
